name: Carrots Lyonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble and attach rotor slicer/shredder using thick slicer cone (no 3).
2. Turn to speed 4 and slice carrots and onions, keeping each separate.
3. Place carrots and chicken broth in a saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat; reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and sugar and sauté for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add flour to onions and cook for 2 minutes.
5. Add carrots, broth, salt, pepper, and nutmeg. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes or until thickened. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
Carrots will stay fresher longer if tops are removed before storing in the vegetable crisper.
